mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.info AS "info", a.imgs AS "imgs", a.vimg AS "vimg", a.video AS "video", a.type AS "type", a.address AS "address", a.lon AS "lon", a.lat AS "lat", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.lianghao AS "u.lianghao", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_dy( id, uid, info, imgs, vimg, video, type, address, lon, lat, del_flag, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{info}, #{imgs}, #{vimg}, #{video}, #{type}, #{address}, #{lon}, #{lat}, #{delFlag}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_dy SET uid = #{u.id}, info = #{info}, imgs = #{imgs}, vimg = #{vimg}, video = #{video}, type = #{type}, address = #{address}, lon = #{lon}, lat = #{lat}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
